title: Jesuh Tangthu Hong Gen Dih In

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Jesuh tangthu hong gen dih in, ke’n za nuam ing;
Hih lai-ah hong om hileh, bang ka gen
Lam gei a muh teng, tuipi tangthu,

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Naupangte tawh a kikholhna, ke’n mu nuam ing;
Gitna kam bek dim hehpihna dim,

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Khuapi sungah ka zui ding hi, naupang hon tawh;
